image_prompt: A surreal and playful illustration of an open book. Instead of regular pages, the pages are depicted as a winding, fantastical landscape, perhaps with tiny paths, trees, or miniature houses, suggesting endless possibilities within. A small, curious character (like an anthropomorphic bookmark or a tiny reader) is exploring these 'pages'. The sentence "Um livro tem páginas." is cleverly integrated as a title on the book's cover or as text along the spine, in a classic, elegant font. The overall style is enchanting and slightly whimsical, celebrating the joy of reading.
caption: Chocante, eu sei! 🤯 Mas quem diria que essa obviedade esconde mundos inteiros? Cada página é um convite para uma nova aventura. Qual livro te levou para o lugar mais inesperado? Compartilhe! #MundoDosLivros #ObvioMasGenial #LeituraVicia #PaginasEHistorias #AmoLer
